title: chrysosplenium pilosum var. fulvum
intro: Chrysosplenium pilosum var. fulvum, also known as the Golden Wood Sorrel, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium pilosum var. fulvum include treating urinary tract issues, reducing fever, and alleviating pain, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the Golden Wood Sorrel include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create remedies for various health conditions.
